_doc.active_leases: Map of 'repo:task-id' -> {agent, started_at, ttl_seconds}. Only one active lease per repo.
_doc.cached_repos: Array of {repo_name, github_repo, bare_path, last_fetched}. Bare clone cache.
_doc.active_clones: Array of {task_id, repo_name, clone_path, branch_name, created_at}. Working clones.
_doc.branches: Array of {task_id, repo_name, branch_name, github_repo, status}. Tracked branches.
_doc.pull_requests: Array of {task_id, repo_name, pr_number, pr_url, status, created_at}. Tracked PRs.
